title: Overworld DNA (Alien Evolution Addon)
description: An alien evolution addon which adds Minecraft vanilla mobs as aliens.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d49e7340b267c4a8de39282e58ff95b034487a5.png)

**Discord Server:** https://discord.gg/GCCbRRxDcH

Have you ever wanted to become "aliens" from the world you already know? Well now you can!

This addon aims to add the Overworld creatures into your watch.

Right now it adds 7 new transformations:

Explosasapien: Use explosive powers to fight your enemies.

Enderite: Use teleportation abilities to move around the overworld or even dimensions.

Arachnean: Become an agile predator with web abilities.

Ferroxian: Become a heavy fighter, born to protect the innocent.

Frostixian: Become colder and colder and use ice to your advantage.

Oxidite: Become an early born species in the Overworld

Porcynox: Become aware.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To obtain the Explosasapien/Enderite/Arachnean, you need to kill Creepers/Endermans/Spiders until you get their special item. Each mob has a 5% chance of dropping said item.

Each item is:
       Creeper skin
       Ender pupil
       Spider fang

To craft the Creeper gunpowder which will give the Explosasapien DNA you will need creeper skin:

![Creeper gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/573ba6a944fd8f58fbaf32108024965c675b8bdf_0.webp)

To craft the End essence which will give the Enderite DNA you will need ender pupil:

![End Essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28759597a50093e813a509e9a83c36026aaaba0f.png)

To craft the Spider venom which will give the Arachnean DNA you will need spider fang:

![Spider venom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e5cdc3263208a887c267e74a17a0f0fa116473c.png)

Once you have any of these items, right click them while wearing any watch to acquire their DNA.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To obtain the Ferroxian DNA you need to find a village with a naturally generated Iron golem (It doesn't work with a player created one).

![Iron golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5be17ea8575eea211338c06b2623027dd65b37c.png)

Then, you need to start a raid (obtain the Bad Omen effect and get close to a village) and once you've cleared all the enemies, you will get the "Hero of the village" effect.

![Bad omen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b14570a88cccf87ccd51b21864e4554de1f2a79.png)

![Hero of the village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/710003865a5045391577c11f0b6e22d8008ba6fe.jpeg)

Interact with the Iron golem while having the Hero of the village effect and it will tell you that it needs a peace offering.

Give it a poppy (Red flower) while wearing any watch and it will allow you to scan its DNA.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To obtain the Frostixian DNA you need to go to a snowy biome and wait until it is raining or storming and create a snow golem.

![snowGolem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b8c215a50ca7de167a8e8d26c7b6e071afbaae0_0.webp)

Right click it and it will tell you that it need to get colder.

You need to give it 1 blue ice and it will freeze.

![frozen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80b44377854ec6e851123e45c4720e58194aa3bd_0.webp)

![Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1978f7c649eaadc19aa2e8b17b3fb6030f33902_0.webp)

After it freezes wait a few seconds and it will drop the "Heart of the Blizzard", right click it while wearing a watch to scan its DNA.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To obtain the Oxidite DNA you need to find a new estructure randomly generated under ground on the Overworld called the "Copper egg".

![egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5c5decc6e56d3c903dac2771cd98208144203bc_0.webp)

Inside you will find a chest, which will contain the "Copper core"

![inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2bde39837744a10db6ddda322aefaf886a4b71c_0.webp)

After obtaining the "Copper core" you need to make lightning turn it on  To do this you can use a lightning rode while it is storming and drop the item next to it.

![rode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ffc310693bee2a91b91a1e5319fe6c503e2542d_0.webp)

After turning it on you will receive the "Copper core charged", right click it while wearing a watch to scan its DNA.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To obtain the Porcynox DNA and the perspective of the most humble observer in the Overworld a mistake needs to happen, tho many would call it a gift.

You can only unlock its vision by mistransforming.

![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c35bb2db38423e34a9b077b0001694f0d7042f_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Summary:

Explosasapien:
Powers: *Explode *Inmune to explosions *Bait (Do a sound bait, doesn't have other uses) *Generate gunpowder *Heal using gunpowder *Last explosion (When about to die do a big explosion) (after hit by lightning you unlock charged abilities) *Charged explosión (Do a bigger and more powerful explosion) *Charged headbutt (Hit a mob a send it to fly) *Charged speed (Run at a very high speed) *Charged healing (Heals at a very fast rate) *Charged lightning (Generate lightning around you as a powerful attack, it Will uncharge you on use)
Weaknesses: *Scared of cats *While being on fire you Will explode uncontrollably
 
Enderite:
Powers: *Teleport a short distance *Inmune to fall damage *Teleport and hit your objective *Rage (All stats are buffed and auto-teleport is deactivated) *Scream (While in rage scream hurting everything around you, during this you won't be able to move) *Generate ender pearls *Teleport to the Overworld while on another dimensión *Freely teleport to the Nether once you have reach it *Freely teleport to the End once you have reach it *Mark a location and teleport to it *Camo mode while crouching mobs don't see you unless you move  
Weaknesses: *When hit by anything you Will auto-teleport a short distance *Hydrophobia
 
Arachnean:
Powers: *Bite (bite your enemies and hit them with slowness and poison) *Inmune to poison and fall damage *Break cobweb just by walking into it *Hit mobs to replenish your hunger (Left click) *Climb (Quickly climb walls) *Spider-sense (See other mobs for a short period of time) *Jump (Do a high jump while crouching) *Generate string *Shoot web (Shoot web that Will trap mobs and slow them down) *Web shield (Generate web around you which Will slow anything that tries to get in and heal while it's active) *Nocturnal predator (Become stronger at night/darkness, buffed stats and night vision) *Web swing to move like certain Superhero Weaknesses: *Spider visión (It makes aiming and accuracy difficult) *Weak while on the day or if there's too much light *Can't hold items
 
Ferroxian: 
Powers: *Extreme health, armor, toughness and damage *Reduced fall damage *Able to breath underwater *Doesn't need to eat *Other iron golems will follow you into battle *Cheaper prices while trading with villagers *Give a poppy to a villager to heal or to obtain iron ingot *Hit the ground and kill everything that's near *Use your hands as an iron pickaxe, shovel or hoe *run at full speed and do a powerful hit *while crouching enemies will ignore you but you will not be able to move *When about to die, become invulnerable for 20 seconds Weaknesses: *doesn't have natural health regeneration *It's very slow and heavy Shares damage with villagers *Will leave the Omnitrix if you kill villagers
 
Frostixian: Every ability changes depending on ice/blue ice armor and giant state (You become stronger the colder and bigger you get). *Throw icy projectiles, *walk on water/lava. *make a snow/ice explosion. *Spawn snow golems. *Become giant while close to 3 other snow golems. *Can walk on powdered snow. *Ice/Blue ice armor give armor and change abilities. *Turn on/off the pumpkin shader. Immune to fire while blue armor is active.  Weaknesses: *melts in the nether/on fire/on water. 
 
Oxidite: *Gain energy overtime. Electric ray that deals damage and burns.  Detectors that show close chests,redstone and metals. *Summon a storm. *Craft copper items. *Electric field that damages anything that gets close. *telekinetic energy to move mobs or blocks and deal damage while using it. *Throw any mob or block while using telekinetic energy. *Use "Forge Energy" to charge objects/blocks that uses that type of energy. Weaknesses: *Oxidizes overtime and loses abilities, use a copper axe to deoxidize.
 
Porcynox: *Eat, *Oink, *Think about existance and damage anything that hears it. *Other players can ride and control you *Stop time around you after thinking about existence. *Pigs follow you. *Equip an elytra that makes you fall slower. *Make an upward and forward impulse while using the elytra. *The more you eat the more armor and slower you get.  Weaknesses: *You can't hold your impulses of following someone with a carrot 


Note: You can find more information about this addon in the official Alien Evo discord server.

Dependencies:

Alien Evolution
Palladium
Geckolib
KubeJS
Rhino
Architectury API
Pehkui
CoreWithStuff

Credits

MajorSirius: Proto/10k/recal/ov uniforms for Ferroxian/Frostixian/Oxidite species.

Babish: Script to limit limb movement and general support. <3

Soru: Icons for aliens, abilities and items.

Steve (SHOUT addon): Script to remove an alien from the Omnitrix.
